> [!CAUTION]
> **DO NOT CREATE A PUBLIC ISSUE FOR SECURITY VULNERABILITIES.**
> Public disclosure of vulnerabilities before a fix is available puts users at risk.

### Private Reporting Channel
Please report all security vulnerabilities privately:
1. **GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting:** Navigate to the "Security" tab of this repository and select "Report a vulnerability".
2. **Email Security:** Email the security maintainers directly at `security@mcp-pi.local`.

Please consult [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for more details.
